meaning: n.蜜特拉神(波斯神话中的光明之神)
examples: Why is Mithras shown wearing a Phrygian cap?
According to Persian mythology, Mithras was born of a virgin given the title 'Mother of God'.
According to some accounts, Mithras died, was buried in a cavernous rock tomb, and was resurrected.
Just behind him lie the remains of a temple to Mithras, or Mithraeum.
The site also includes a previously unexcavated section of the Temple of Mithras, a Roman cult, which was first unearthed in 1954.
